purpose: Own draw lifecycle and setup helpers used by the Points renderer.
invariants: Draw-specific UniformStore and Model setup helpers may live here; Points keeps resource lifetime and draw ordering.
Hot-path uniform helpers mutate caller-owned scratch payloads.
Draw order and resource binding cache ownership stay in src/modules/Points/index.ts.
change_protocols: Changing a uniform field requires checking the matching shader declaration and Points UniformStore setup.
Changing draw classification thresholds requires preserving existing direct-vs-culled behavior unless explicitly requested.
